ModMetaData.name: Piped CE Autoloaders
ModMetaData.author: Sanicek
ModMetaData.description:
Piped CE Autoloaders provides three color-coded ammunition pipe networks. Each restart-required setting binds one network to a validated Combat Extended ammo set and exact physical round. Pipe-backed loaders fill Combat Extended's native autoloader buffer while excluding pawn refill, adjacent-turret manual reload, and ammo-management interactions.
https://github.com/sanicek/rw-piped-ce-autoloaders
